title: Hermes Agent 5.0 (New Upgrades): HERMES BECAME ULTRA-HERMES!
summary: Hermes Agent 0.16 is a major release introducing a native desktop app for macOS, Linux, and Windows, remote gateway support for connecting to remote servers, improved web dashboard with admin controls, fuzzy model search, slash undo for session rewinding, and security improvements. The release aims to make the agent platform more accessible across multiple surfaces with better UX and stronger security.
